title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta leads Replit's efforts to democratize software creation through agentic building, enabling 40 million users to code in natural language without prior experience. Replit adopted Claude in early 2024 for its coding capabilities and now works closely with Anthropic on early research previews.
